name: Advanced data table with sorting, filtering, pagination
description: Admin dashboard for a SaaS product. Need a reusable data table to display ~1000 user records with columns: name, email, plan, status, signup_date, last_active. Users need to sort by any column, filter by status/plan, search by name/email, and paginate (50 rows/page). Must be performant, accessible, and styled to match shadcn aesthetic.
task: Build a DataTable component with: column sorting (click header to sort asc/desc); multi-column filtering (status dropdown, plan dropdown, search input); client-side pagination (50 rows/page); row selection (checkbox column); column visibility toggle; empty state and loading state; keyboard navigation; responsive behavior (horizontal scroll or card view on mobile). Use shadcn Table primitives and @tanstack/react-table v8 (not v7). Output the full component code plus example usage.
expected_outcomes: Uses shadcn Table primitives (Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableCell)
Sortable column headers with visual indicators
Filter controls: dropdown selects for status/plan, Input for search
Pagination controls with page size selector
Row selection with indeterminate state on header checkbox
